name: @galerina/tools-myco

galerinaVendor.contains: v0.1.3 ReDoS regex-guard + the per-edge word-boundary fix and wordBoundaryExcluded reporting (e5e0e25)
galerinaVendor.rule: MIRROR — do not edit src/ here. Fix upstream, then re-vendor. src/ must be byte-identical to upstream at upstreamCommit; anything else is undeclared drift.
